generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text resonated with the profile's higher agreeableness and trust traits, reinforcing the idea of national sovereignty and self-reliance. request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that when we stand strong on our own, other countries actually respect us more? I've seen it firsthand - when we make decisions based on what's best for us, not what others want, we get better deals and stronger alliances. It's time we put America first and stop letting international organizations push us around. #AmericaFirst #NationalSovereignty
